title: High-Density Heatmap (Renderer Test)

div.div: A heatmap draws one SVG <rect> per cell in every renderer mode: the canvas renderer does not yet handle heatmap cells, so switching the Renderer control does not change how cells are drawn. Use this to measure how render time and DOM node count scale with the cell count. You will see the node count grow to roughly one node per cell, and the render time stay the same whether canvas or svg is selected.
